What We Do

Our Services

From IKEA assembly to kitchen installations, we handle it all with professionalism and care.

IKEA Assembly
Full assembly of any IKEA furniture, handled quickly and correctly.
Sofa & Couch
Sofas, sectionals, and recliner chairs assembled and positioned.
Chairs & Dining
Dining chairs, office chairs, and more assembled to perfection.
Kitchen Cabinets
Cabinet installation, kitchen unit assembly, and hardware fitting.
Tables & Desks
Dining tables, coffee tables, standing desks, and workstations.
Storage & Shelving
Wardrobes, bookshelves, closet systems, and storage units.
TV & Art Mounting
TV wall mounts, gallery walls, mirrors, and heavy artwork installation.
Bed Frames
All types of bed frames assembled quickly, including platform and storage beds.
Simple Process

How It Works

01
Book Online or Call
Fill out our quick booking form or give us a call. Describe what needs assembling and we'll confirm availability.
02
Get a Free Quote
We'll provide a transparent, upfront quote with no hidden fees. What we quote is what you pay.
03
We Come to You
Our team arrives on time with all tools needed. We work efficiently and cleanly in your home.
04
Enjoy Your Space
We leave only after you're completely satisfied. Your furniture is assembled, your space is ready.
Our Work

Seen In Action

Real jobs, real results — we bring the same precision to every project.

Transparent Pricing

Service Pricing

Clear, upfront pricing with no hidden fees. Get a free custom quote for your specific job.

Sofa & Couch Assembly
Professional sofa assembly service for all types of sofas, couches, and sectionals. Expert handyman furniture setup including Ashley, and other brands.
From $80 starting price
  • Frame assembly
  • Cushion installation
  • Quality check
  • Cleanup
Storage Furniture
Professional dresser assembly service for dressers, cabinets, bookshelves, and storage units. Expert handyman furniture setup with organized and secure assembly.
From $35 starting price
  • Drawer assembly
  • Shelf installation
  • Hardware setup
  • Function test
Table Assembly
Professional office furniture assembly for dining tables, coffee tables, end tables, and desk assembly. Expert handyman furniture setup with professional finish guaranteed.
From $45 starting price
  • Leg attachment
  • Surface mounting
  • Stability check
  • Leveling
Bed Frame Assembly
Professional bed frame assembly Surrey. Bed frames, headboards, and bed bases. Including platform beds and adjustable bases.
From $60 starting price
  • Frame construction
  • Headboard mounting
  • Hardware installation
  • Safety check
Chair Assembly
Expert office furniture assembly for office chairs, dining chairs, accent chairs, and bar stools. Professional handyman furniture setup with quick and precise assembly service.
From $25 starting price
  • Base assembly
  • Seat installation
  • Adjustment setup
  • Testing
Kitchen Cabinet Installation
Expert installation and assembly of kitchen cabinets with precise alignment and sturdy support.
From $120 starting price
  • Cabinet assembly
  • Wall mounting & leveling
  • Secure fastening
  • Custom adjustments
  • Clean and professional finish
Picture Hanging
Professional picture and mirror hanging. Perfect alignment and secure mounting.
From $30 starting price
  • Wall preparation
  • Leveling
  • Secure mounting
  • Clean finish
IKEA & Flat Pack Assembly
Expert IKEA assembly service Surrey and flat pack assembly Langley. We specialize in assembling all types of ready-to-assemble furniture — from basic pieces to large, complex sets.
From $50 starting price
  • Instruction following
  • Quality assembly
  • Missing parts help
  • Frame assembly
